<|startoftranscript|><|en|><|transcribe|><|0.00|> And when you and I trust these words and in the core of our being trust that Jesus the Christ is with us, our face shines too.<|16.16|><|endoftext|>
<|startoftranscript|><|en|><|transcribe|><|0.00|> And perhaps that's the reason why Jesus or this gospel writer was adamant not to talk too much about it.<|9.10|>

<|16.06|> we might forget to look at our own reflection.<|18.88|>
